entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -

[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:02.388389 from 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DataQualityCommittee/dqc_us_rules/refs/heads/v28/dqc_us_rules/resources/Taxonomies/us-gaap-cal-2025-all.xsd' - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\BMMJ_instance_2023_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0045.6836] The concept us-gaap:ProceedsFromNotesPayable appears in the investing cashflows of the companies cash flow statement. us-gaap:ProceedsFromNotesPayable is a financing item and it is expected that this item would only appear in the cash flow generated from financing activities. Please review the calculations defined for the cash flow statement to determine that the correct element has been used for this item.
Rule Element Id:6836 Rule version: 29.0.2 - BMMJ_instance_2023_2025.xml 4309
